recentExecutionFailures.jm1_actiondescription: CAP-011 production proof completed on jmerrill.pub. Evidence: PR #253 merge 885d803b deployed marketing form; PR #254 merge 4e03e55 deployed durable-session route; PR #255 merge 5c8881a deployed idempotency guard. Unauthenticated POST to /api/author/marketing-profile returned 401. Authenticated AOC rendered marketing profile form and authorized projects. Controlled no-change author submission wrote Core execution log 45009d2b-1280-f111-ab0f-000d3a14673b. Retry/idempotency proof found exactly one log for hash 0ac5960d82e88d59b2b755af84e92d6b207c52c8db0aa82cd3b81af7ac1d0a2f. Project switching rendered Establishing Glory and The Long Watch without workspace error. Invalid project-scoped portal URL did not expose unauthorized project, but remained in loading state and is retained as UX hardening note. Correlation: CAP011_CONTROLLED_PROOF-5f11d54c-e3f1-4ce2-ab30-1d08db325267.

Approved bibliographic safe-write manifest prepared, but PATCH to jm1pub_title f1908dc9-5775-f111-ab0f-6045bdd69435 failed for current app identity due to missing prvWritejm1pub_Title. Key Vault search did not locate a JM1-PUB-INTAKE-WEBAPI Dataverse credential. Correlation: CAP009_SAFE_WRITE_BLOCKED-0474f69a-ba55-4498-8c0f-f4d11840755d.
